title: Datadog Rips Higher As AI Customers Fuel Revenue Acceleration
text: Datadog Revenue Acceleration Driven by AI Customers. Growth Acceleration: Datadog reported Q1 2026 revenue of 1.01 billion up 32 percent year-over-year marking the first time quarterly revenue has crossed the 1 billion threshold. This represents a significant acceleration from prior quarters with revenue growth rising from 29 percent last quarter and 25 percent in the year-ago quarter. Dual Growth Drivers: AI-Native Customers: AI-native revenue was estimated at 133 million for Q1 2026 including around 88 million from OpenAI up more than 90 percent year-on-year and 45 million from other AI natives up 240 percent. Non-AI Customers: Non-AI customer revenue growth accelerated to mid-20s percent year-over-year demonstrating that the platform's growth is not solely a function of AI infrastructure spend. Customer Growth Metrics: Datadog ended Q1 2026 with about 4,550 customers at 100,000 plus ARR and 603 customers at 1 million plus ARR. New logo bookings more than doubled year-over-year and set an all-time record. Forward Guidance: For the full year Datadog guided revenue to 4.3 billion to 4.34 billion representing 25 to 27 percent growth.
